growth_records.medium: Unamended 0.6 um-filtered natural seawater (dissolved organic matter), virus-reduced by dilution
growth_records.cite: Long et al. Benchmarking microbial growth rate predictions from metagenomes. ISME J (2021). DOI:10.1038/s41396-020-00773-1. [PMC7852909]
growth_records.snippet: the growth rates estimated for previously uncultivated SAR406 (0.29-0.39 per day) were similar to those of several other marine heterotrophs
growth_records.notes: Observed growth range 0.29-0.39 per day. Converted per-day to per-h by /24: max 0.39/24=0.01625 h^-1 (recorded), min 0.29/24=0.01208 h^-1. Doubling time = ln2/0.01625 = 42.66 h.
